title: BEM-865 wire GPT scheduler tick
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/gpt_scheduler_tick.yml')
p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
if 'tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py --once' not in text:
    text = '''name: gpt_scheduler_tick

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  actions: write

jobs:
  tick:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Run GPT relay tick
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          python3 tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py --once
'''
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('wired gpt_scheduler_tick to relay_watch once')
"""
No issue comments.
